name: Powerline Catppuccin
description: Soft pastel dark statusline with Catppuccin Mocha palette and floating diamond pill segments. Gentle lavender, sky blue, teal, and peach accents on dark base.
features: Floating diamond pill segments (rounded caps) on terminal background
Catppuccin Mocha palette: mauve, sky blue, teal, peach, rosewater
Pill 1: Model name with star icon (mauve/lavender)
Pill 2: Context usage bar — teal at low, peach at medium, maroon at high
Pill 3: Session cost with diamond icon (rosewater)
Pill 4: Git branch with staged/modified counts (sky blue, when in repo)
Pill 5: Duration and lines changed (muted surface, secondary text)
